mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, user_name, content, visibility_level, confirm, create_date FROM `comment` WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_date ASC
SELECT id, user_id, user_name, content, visibility_level, confirm, create_date FROM `comment` WHERE id = #{commentId} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `comment` WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `comment` (post_id, user_id, user_name, content, visibility_level, confirm, is_deleted, create_date, modified_date) VALUES (#{postId}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{content}, 'partial', #{confirm}, 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.delete: UPDATE `comment` SET is_deleted = 1, modified_date = NOW() WHERE post_id = #{postId}
